title: Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026, District-wise Vacancies in Multiple States
job_location: Aadhaar Seva Kendra (ASK) in various districts
short_info: CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd (CSC) has published the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill multiple Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator positions across various districts in Telangana, Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, Uttar Pradesh, and Odisha. Candidates aged 18 years and above who possess 12th Pass/Intermediate, 10th Pass with 2 years ITI, or 10th Pass with 3 years Polytechnic Diploma along with a valid UIDAI Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate are eligible to apply online through the official CSC portal. The application process is active and will remai

qualification.details: Minimum age: 18 years as on the last date of application. Upper age limit, if any, will be as per CSC/concerned guidelines. | Candidate must have any one of the following qualifications: | 12th / Intermediate / Senior Secondary, or Matriculation / 10th with 2 years ITI, or Matriculation / 10th with 3 years Polytechnic Diploma. | Candidate should possess a valid Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate issued by a Testing & Certifying Agency authorized by UIDAI. The certificate must be valid at the time of application and during the contract period. | Candidate should have basic computer skills. Familiarity with Aadhaar enrolment/update software and biometric devices will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Remuneration will be as per the minimum wages of the respective State prescribed for semi-skilled manpower. Final payout structure and other benefits, if any, will be as per CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd norms.

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates should check their eligibility including age, qualification and Aadhaar certification before applying.
Visit the CSC ASK information page for details and updates: CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra ASK.
Follow the application instructions issued by CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd for the respective state/district.
Keep all required documents and Aadhaar certification details ready while applying.
The last date for submission of application is 20 June 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026 is 20 June 2026. Candidates should complete the application process before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age required for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old as of the last date of application. Any upper age limit will be applicable as per CSC guidelines

faq.question: Q3. What educational qualifications are required for Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator posts?
faq.answer: Applicants must have passed 12th (Senior Secondary), or 10th with 2 years ITI, or 10th with 3 years Polytechnic Diploma from a recognized institution

faq.question: Q4. Is Aadhaar Supervisor Certification mandatory for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must possess a valid UIDAI-authorized Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate at the time of application and throughout the contract period

faq.question: Q5. What is the job location for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will work at Aadhaar Seva Kendras (ASKs) located in various districts of Telangana, Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, Uttar Pradesh, and Odisha.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator contract?
faq.answer: The engagement is purely contractual and will be for a period of one year. The contract may be governed by CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd rules and requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What salary will be paid to Aadhaar Supervisors and Operators?
faq.answer: The remuneration will be based on the minimum wages prescribed for semi-skilled manpower in the respective state. Additional benefits, if any, will be provided as per CSC norms.

faq.question: Q8. Can Village Level Entrepreneurs (VLEs) apply for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Village Level Entrepreneurs (VLEs) are not eligible to apply for these Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator positions

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates obtain Aadhaar Supervisor Certification?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the Aadhaar Supervisor Exam through the UIDAI-authorized examination portal. After approval by the concerned State Team and successful completion of the exam and LMS certification, candidates can obtain the required certificate.

faq.question: Q10. Which states have vacancies under CSC Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in multiple districts across Telangana, Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, Uttar Pradesh, and Odisha. Candidates can apply for openings in their preferred district, subject to eligibility and vacancy availability.
